features: Natural rattan stems which delicately diffuse the fresh scent

description: Experience the captivating scent of Blackberry Fig with this Airwick Air Freshener Reed Diffuser. This pack of 5 x 33 ml bottles features natural rattan stems that delicately diffuse the fresh, long-lasting fragrance, which is crafted with natural essential oils. Each bottle lasts up to four weeks, creating a pleasant atmosphere in rooms up to 10 square meters. The elegant, 21 cm tall bottles are available in a sleek purple color, adding a touch of sophistication to any space. Enjoy the continuous, passive diffusion of your favorite scent without the need for electricity.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Creating a continuous and pleasant fragrance in a room
